restaurants.raw_notes: Theatrical and immersive century-old townhouse specializing in turmeric-marinated catfish (chả cá) prepared tableside with fresh herbs. ⚠️ POTENTIAL FAKE-ADDRESS WARNING per SKILL.md — multiple impostor 'Chả Cá Thăng Long' branches exist in Hanoi. Verify official location in enrichment.

restaurants.raw_address: 10 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hoàn Kiếm
restaurants.raw_notes: Tightly packed Old Quarter spot serving Northern-style beef noodle soup. ⚠️ STREET FOOD — below 800k VND threshold. Defer to invalid-entries (Michelin Bib Gourmand 2025+2026).

restaurants.raw_address: 46 P. Thợ Nhuộm, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm
restaurants.raw_notes: Hanoi's original destination Indian restaurant operating since early 2000s with traditional recipes refined over decades. Reliable upscale Indian option.

restaurants.raw_address: 18 P. Phan Bội Châu, Hoàn Kiếm
restaurants.raw_notes: Vietnam's most stylish food court with regional stations. ⚠️ BORDERLINE — dishes 50-150k each, per-person spend likely below 800k VND target. Defer to invalid-entries OR include as casual-colleagues / family option.
Sophisticated wine bar in converted shophouse with 350-bottle cellar and seafood-led small plates. Great date / business option.
